title: Combat Bash
description: Turns the Combat Roll mod from defensive to offensive!
body:
![Banner](https://i.imgur.com/nOOcnZ7.png)

---

### Ever wanted to bash/smash/spindash into enemies in Minecraft? Here's your chance!

An addon mod for [Combat Roll by daedelus](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/combat-roll), this small mod makes the signature roll from a defensive getaway tool into an offensive attack maneuverer!

Rolling into an enemy now *damages and knocks them back*! The roll itself is still handled by Combat Roll, so the distance, cooldown time and everything can still be configured, but the damage and knockback force can too.

On top of that, **Combat Bash** adds a new enchantment, *Inertia*, to increase damage dealt by your rolls. If you so wish, you can make the bash only trigger if you have at least one level of this enchantment!

---

### Ever wanted team attacks to be viable in Minecraft? Here's your chance!

From version 1.2, **Combat Bash** also reworks the *invulnerability frame system to be per player*: If you hit a mob, it's only immune to *your* attacks for the next second, letting your friends hit it too! (Configurable)
